Privacy Policy

Last updated: April 2026. The Unified Framework Collective ('UFC', 'we', 'our') operates the website at unifiedframeworkcollective.surge.sh. This page describes our policies regarding the collection and use of personal information when you visit our site. We do not collect personal data through this website. This is a static informational site with no login, registration, or form submission functionality. When you purchase our books through third-party platforms (Amazon, Lulu, Gumroad), those purchases are subject to the privacy policies of those respective platforms, not this policy. We may use basic, anonymised web analytics to understand how our site is used. This does not identify individual visitors. If you have any questions about this policy, please contact us via our LinkedIn page.
